subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark jeans, stepping off the curb into a streetlamp pool to cross the night street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears sneakers; the red jacket lit vividly by the nearby streetlamp against the dark road
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark jeans, sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Medium tan, smooth youthful skin lit cool by the streetlamp
subjects.facial_features: Round face lit from above by the lamp, dark short hair, small features

subjects.description: Parked passenger cars lining both curbs of the night street, roofs catching the streetlamp glow
subjects.appearance_details: A mix of sedans and SUVs in dark, muted colors, their upper panels lit by streetlamps and darkening between the pools
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A North American suburban residential street on a clear autumn night, lit by pools of cool streetlight. Single-family homes with a few glowing porch and window lights sit behind low fences and shedding trees along a two-lane dry-asphalt road. Streetlamps cast overlapping pools of light along the block; parked cars line the curbs, and sidewalks run beside the homes. Between the lamp pools the road darkens, its faded center markings dim under the night sky.

lighting.conditions: Clear autumn night under cool streetlights
lighting.direction: Downward pools of light from evenly spaced overhead streetlamps
lighting.shadows: Pooled, cool-toned shadows radiating from each lamp, deepening between the pools
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool streetlight pools alternate with darkness; the child's red jacket glows sharply as it passes beneath a nearby lamp

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool blue-grey night with warm porch-light spots and amber streetlamp pools, dark asphalt, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket under the lamplight
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, quiet suburban night calm broken by sudden braking tension
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating streetlamp pools, parked cars, bare-limbed trees, dark house silhouettes

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the lamplit road and crossing child; dark areas between lamp pools fall into shadow

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the streetlit suburban residential street at night.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk into a streetlamp pool and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the dry asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips and headlights sweep low.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the dry asphalt, partially faded, glowing where a streetlamp pool falls across it and dimming beyond
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the streetlit suburban street at night, lamp pools and parked cars along the dark road.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps into a lamp pool and onto the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears in lamplight; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely under the streetlights.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a streetlit suburban residential street on a clear autumn night, lamp pools spaced along the dark road past parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk into a lamp pool and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch as headlights sweep the road. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Quiet suburban night with faint crickets and distant traffic, the low hum of the vehicle over dry asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle with soft night sounds.
